description: Implement the Android 12+ Splash Screen API in the 'SunriseApp' project. The implementation must utilize the `androidx.core:core-splashscreen` library (version 1.0.1 or newer) and include a theme named `Theme.App.Starting` inheriting from `Theme.SplashScreen`. This theme must specify a white background (#FFFFFF), the `@mipmap/ic_launcher` icon, and `@style/Theme.SunriseApp` as the post-splash screen theme. Ensure the application is configured to use this theme at launch and that the splash screen is initialized in the main activity prior to setting the content view.
